---
title: "Proquest Historical Annual Reports"
page-layout: article
---

# Proquest Historical Annual Reports

**Provider:** ProQuest

## Description

Digital archive of annual reports from major North American companies over more than a century. Supports corporate history, financial history, and business research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb648)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
